headlines.title: Julián Quiñones anota el primer gol del Mundial para México
headlines.description: El delantero aprovechó una recuperación tras una presión alta para marcar el primer tanto de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

headlines.title: Raúl Jiménez anota el 2-0 con dedicación al cielo
headlines.description: El delantero apareció a segundo palo para rematar frente a la portería. El ex americanista marcó su primer gol en Copas del Mundo.

headlines.title: Trump says deal with Iran could be signed in days
headlines.description: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Why Trump’s eyes are on Iran’s Kharg Island — and why that's a risk
headlines.description: The island less than 20 miles off Iran accounts for more than 90% of the country's oil exports.

headlines.title: SpaceX locks in IPO price of $135, making it largest stock debut ever
headlines.description: The company controlled by Elon Musk will begin trading Friday at a valuation of $1.77 trillion.

headlines.title: Trump nominates Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: The president had named Pulte to hold the Cabinet position temporarily after Tulsi Gabbard resigned from the post.

headlines.title: El Niño is officially here, and this one could be a doozy
headlines.description: Prepare for heat, drought and flooding — it’s officially El Niño season, according to the National Weather Service. This one could be on par with some of the strongest.

headlines.title: Republicans who pushed Epstein files release see political careers upended by Trump
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has taken political revenge on all four Republicans who signed on to the Epstein files release law.

headlines.title: Trump’s UFC matches are unprecedented, but sports at the White House aren’t
headlines.description: The UFC matches to be held on the lawn of the White House on President Donald Trump’s 80th birthday are sure to be a spectacle unseen in the history of the storied complex

headlines.title: A Nebraska immigration raid shut businesses down a year ago. The fallout is ongoing, officials say.
headlines.description: Local businesses have taken a hit as families and workers grapple with the effects of the raid last June on the Glenn Valley Foods meatpacking plant, community members said.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Federal authorities investigate giant ‘8647’ markings on National Mall
headlines.description: A judge ruled this month that the numbers on their own, which the Trump administration has called a threat against the president, constitute free speech.
